title: Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro Debuts on AI Index, Weights Coming
summary: Xiaomi's MiMo V2.5 Pro model has been ranked 54th on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index, and the company hinted that model weights will be released soon. This marks Xiaomi's entry into the competitive AI leaderboard with a 1-trillion-parameter MoE model, and the potential open-weight release could significantly impact the local LLM community by enabling self-hosting and fine-tuning. MiMo V2.5 Pro is a multimodal, agentic LLM with 1 million context length, designed for complex software engineering and long-horizon tasks. It entered public beta on April 2026.
context: The Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index is a composite benchmark that aggregates ten challenging evaluations to measure AI capabilities across mathematics, science, coding, and reasoning. Xiaomi's MiMo series is a family of large language models developed by the Chinese electronics giant, with the V2.5 Pro being its most capable model to date.
discussion: The Reddit community showed high engagement with 342 upvotes and a 96% upvote ratio, expressing excitement about the potential open-weight release. Many users discussed the implications for self-hosting and competition with other open-weight models.
